description: Legal deed. In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated: End of Heshvan, 5562 AM = October/November 1801 CE. Meʾir Ben-Naʿim invests 100 reales (1 real = 90 medins) with Raḥamim Tājirī and his wife Mazal. Based on the layout/letter forms, the document was likely recorded by Meʾir Ben-Naʿim. Although Nissīm Najjar includes "סו" in his signature (commonly = so[fer]), his autograph does not match the scribal hand throughout the rest of the document. It seems likely that Najjar intended "סו" as "סופו טוב" instead.
description_he: שטר משפטי בעברית. מקום: קהיר. תאריך: סוף חשון ה'תקס"ב = אוקטובר/נובמבר 1801 לספירה. מאיר בן נעים משקיע 100 ריאל (1 ריאל = 90 מדינים) אצל רחמים תאג'ירי ואשתו מזל.
